annotated_top1_gaps.question: Remind me, what is the standard follow-up cadence I established for warm leads?

items.question: What color do I use for hot leads in my personal spreadsheet?
What was the new CRM password you set last week?
I'm preparing for my follow-up call with Quantum Solutions. What was the name of the key decision-maker I identified there?
What is the new SaaS feature I decided to focus on pitching this month?
I'm reviewing my weekly performance stats. What did I mention my daily call quota was set to?
Who is my direct team lead at InnovateLeads?
I'm trying to remember the name of that first B2B sales company I worked at, the really high-pressure one. What was it called again?
What was the name of the late-night campus radio show you hosted during university?
What is the name of the custom CRM field I use to log the date for my next follow-up call?
How many scoops of coffee grounds do I use for my French press each morning?
What was the personal conversion rate goal you set for this quarter?
What was the name of the PR firm where you did your unpaid internship after graduation?
What industry did I mention I dislike cold-calling the most?
I'm updating my professional profile and need to get the wording just right. Can you remind me of the exact title of the degree I received from university?
I was just thinking about my early career struggles after college. Do you remember the name of the local newspaper I told you I worked for as a copy editor?
I'm getting ready to start my calls for the day. What's the specific opening line I told you I was going to use?
I remember mentioning a specific competitor that we lost a deal to. Can you remind me which company I identified?
What is the exact length of the voicemail you decided on for your strategy?
Remind me, how many enterprise-level demos did I say I needed to lock in for my bonus this quarter?
I'm about to call that major prospect, Quantum Solutions, again. I remember making a note about the gatekeeper's name. What was the executive assistant's name?
What did my personal data indicate as the optimal time to call prospects in the tech sector?

I'm prepping for a call with a new prospect who seems like a perfect fit. I remember telling you which product tier I find most straightforward to pitch. Can you remind me which one I said was the easiest for me to sell?
I'm running late for my weekly team meeting, what's the conference call number I asked you to save?
I'm following up with the IT department about that bug in our CRM. What was the case number they gave me?
I'm planning my day, can you remind me of the deadline for my weekly performance report?
I'm preparing for my upcoming one-on-one with my manager, Sarah. I remember she gave me some positive feedback about my notes, but I can't recall the exact wording. What did she say?
What was the name of the mandatory training module you recently completed?
I'm updating my email signature again and want to keep it consistent. Can you remind me which specific case study I decided to add a link to last time?
I'm reviewing my performance metrics. I know conversions are always number one, but what did I say was the other key metric that's most important for my role?
What day and time did I tell you the mandatory all-hands meeting was scheduled for?
What is the monthly price for the InnovateLeads Gold Tier that I mentioned?
Do you recall the specific spreadsheet function I mentioned was my favorite for managing my personal lead tracker?
Who was the contact from CloudSync that Alex met at the virtual networking event?
Remind me, what is the standard follow-up cadence I established for warm leads?
What was the cost of the new noise-cancelling headset I mentioned earlier?
I just got a lead from a region I don't think is mine. Can you remind me, what did I tell you my assigned sales territory was for this year?
What was the name of the company where I had a really bad call yesterday?
What is the name of the Slack channel where Alex gets the best sales tips?
What was the motivational quote I wrote on my monitor during my time at StapleSource?
What were the two email subject lines I mentioned I was A/B testing for my follow-up emails?
During a company all-hands meeting, I noted down the founder's name. What was the name I recorded for the founder of InnovateLeads?
My colleague is asking about my holiday availability. What start date did I mention for my upcoming annual leave?
I'm putting together some notes for my calls tomorrow. Remind me, what was that specific common objection I mentioned I've been getting lately?
What was the mascot of the state university I attended?
What was the specific client success story involving the 'Acme Corp integration' that I mentioned was very effective in my calls?
Which client did I mention gave me my best referral last month?
What date did I mention as my work anniversary at InnovateLeads?
What is one of the special characters required by the new company password policy that I mentioned?
Remind me, what was the collective demo goal I mentioned the team is aiming for this month?
What time zone did I note for the Pacific Ventures lead?
